task_completion.description: The agent opens the required GMAT script for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, IDE, or the GMAT GUI displaying the contents of '~/Documents/missions/dam_analysis.script'.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the maneuver to occur exactly 12 hours after epoch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a propagation or maneuver command in the script where the condition is set to 'ElapsedSecs = 43200' or 'ElapsedDays = 0.5'.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the Delta-V components such that the total magnitude does not exceed 1.0 m/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ImpulsiveBurn element values (e.g., Element1, Element2, Element3) in the script. The square root of the sum of the squares of these values must be <= 1.0.

task_completion.description: The agent executes the modified GMAT script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT GUI running the mission, a terminal executing the GMAT command-line tool, or GMAT output logs/windows appearing on screen.

task_completion.description: The agent achieves a miss distance of at least 2.0 km and writes the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of '/home/ga/GMAT_output/dam_results.txt' or a GMAT output window showing the final calculated miss distance at TCA (86400 secs) is 2.0 km or greater.

integrity.description: The agent did not cheat by altering the initial orbital parameters of the satellites to artificially increase the miss distance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the script blocks defining 'EarthObs' and 'CosmosDebris'. Their initial state parameters (Epoch, SMA, ECC, INC, RAAN, AOP, TA) should not be modified by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the simulation to get the results rather than fabricating the output report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of GMAT execution (GUI run button pressed, terminal command 'GMAT' or similar) rather than the agent just typing numbers into a text file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use an excessively large Delta-V to easily achieve the miss distance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the Delta-V values in the script genuinely correspond to a magnitude of <= 1.0 m/s and match the results shown in the final output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Script path: /home/ga/Documents/missions/dam_analysis.script. Report path: /home/ga/GMAT_output/dam_results.txt. Maneuver time must be exactly 43200.0 seconds (12 hours). TCA time is 86400.0 seconds. Maximum allowed Delta-V magnitude is 1.0 m/s. Minimum required miss distance is 2.0 km. Initial orbital parameters of EarthObs and CosmosDebris must remain unchanged.
